name: Praxis Home Retail Limited
summary: Praxis Home Retail Limited engages in the business of home retailing through departmental stores in India. The company offers furniture, d√É¬©cor and furnishings, modular kitchen, electronics, kitchenware, and bathroom accessories, as well as customized solutions in kitchen and wardrobes, and interior design consultation and services for homes and offices. As of March 31, 2020, it owned and operated 47 stores in 28 cities under the HomeTown brand name, as well as www.hometown.in, a web portal. Praxis Home Retail Limited founded in 2007 and is based in Mumbai, India. Praxis Home Retail Limited operates as a subsidiary of Future Corporate Resources Limited.
